claim_boundary.claim_ceiling: active-null and failure-baseline matrix only; no proxy derivation, proxy divergence, proxy collapse, AP5 bridge, semantic goal, agency, native support, sentience, Phase 8, ant ecology, or unscoped multi-basin claim

purpose: instantiate active nulls and failure baselines before positive proxy probes
